author: yaye.work
description: Browse your notes on a calendar. Every note appears on the day you created it, like a Daily Note setup but automatic. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: yaye.work
manifest.description: Browse your notes on a calendar. Every note appears on the day you created it, like a Daily Note setup but automatic.
manifest.name: Note Diary

name: Note Diary

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description: Initial release of Note Diary. Browse your notes on a calendar, every note appears on the day you created it, with dots and accent intensity scaling to how many you made. Click a day to see that day's notes as cards; zoom out to month and year views.
